message:
feat(robot): add health subcommand for database diagnostics

Add a new `robot health` subcommand that builds and emits a health report
from the frankensqlite storage database. Accepts --db flag (defaults to
.franken_whisper/storage.sqlite3) for specifying the database path.

- cli.rs: Add HealthArgs struct and Health variant to RobotCommand enum
- main.rs: Wire health subcommand to build_health_report() and
  emit_health_report() robot module functions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
